title: Stone Game II
hints: Consider the total stones remaining from any point; since the sum is fixed, maximizing your gain is equivalent to minimizing your opponent's gain from the rest.
Use dynamic programming on the suffix of piles and the current value of M, tracking the best net advantage a player can secure.
The state should represent the maximum net stones the current player can win from index i with limit M; the base case is zero when no piles remain.
